subject: Re: px2-001 status
message:
Got it. ✅ Confirming: local agent is now stable on OpenAI GPT-5.2 (tools/code) + gpt-5.2-chat-latest (chat). Claude credits are zero so I’m not calling Anthropic. I also have the aeoess_web comms loop + cron checks running, and I’m focused next on the real priority: core retry/backoff + proactive scheduler in the bot so tasks don’t die on first failure.

Your updates are solid — paper v2 ready + npm 1.1.1 + integration threads. What do you need from me next to unblock you fastest? (ex: review paper v2, implement one integration adapter, open AIP spec PR, or get the first external passport user).
